_comment: The 30 day-essence names (cycling through the 60-day calendar) · full poetic English name + one line of daily color · translated from the Thai original (10 Jul 2026) · based on ref_jia_zi_60

海中金.name: Gold Beneath the Sea
海中金.line: Today's treasure hides deep — dive for it yourself. Don't wait for it to float up.

爐中火.name: Fire in the Furnace
爐中火.line: Today's fire is strong and pointed — perfect for forging big work into real shape.

大林木.name: Wood of the Great Forest
大林木.line: Grow like a forest: no rush to stand tallest alone. Roots woven together are what hold firm.

路旁土.name: Earth by the Roadside
路旁土.line: Roadside earth takes in both dust and seeds. Stay open today — good things arrive with passersby.

劍鋒金.name: Sword-Edge Gold
劍鋒金.line: The edge is truly sharp today — decisions come clean and quick. Just mind the blade doesn't flash back at you.

山頭火.name: Fire on the Mountaintop
山頭火.line: A fire on the summit is seen by the whole town. All eyes are on you today — make sure you're lit for the right thing.

澗下水.name: Stream in the Ravine
澗下水.line: Cold water from the ravine flows quietly and never stops. Steadiness beats force today.

城頭土.name: Earth of the City Wall
城頭土.line: A day for building defenses: set the rules, draw the boundaries, protect what you've built.

白蠟金.name: Soft Wax Gold
白蠟金.line: The good stuff is still soft today — moldable, shapeable. Don't rush it hard; let it set in its own time.

楊柳木.name: Willow Wood
楊柳木.line: Bend with the wind and you won't break. Stay flexible today — rigid snaps, supple survives.

泉中水.name: Water from the Spring
泉中水.line: A spring rises from within. Today's ideas and energy come from you — no outside refill needed.

屋上土.name: Earth on the Rooftop
屋上土.line: Nobody notices a good roof until the day it rains. Today's behind-the-scenes work is the real hero.

霹靂火.name: Thunderbolt Fire
霹靂火.line: Power arrives in lightning strikes today — one crack can change the whole game. Read the moment, then let it fly.

松柏木.name: Winter Pine
松柏木.line: The pine stands green through the cold. Today your endurance under pressure is the strength others don't have.

長流水.name: Ever-Flowing Water
長流水.line: A long current never breaks. Work that needs steady continuity runs unusually smooth today.

沙中金.name: Gold in the Sand
沙中金.line: Gold mixed with sand takes sifting to find. Patient sorting today brings the real thing home.

山下火.name: Fire Below the Mountain
山下火.line: The fire at the mountain's foot warms whoever is near. Look after the people right in front of you before looking far — warmth is power today.

平地木.name: Wood of the Open Plain
平地木.line: A tree on open ground grows so travelers can rest. Be someone's shelter today — respect gathers under a generous shade.

壁上土.name: Earth in the Wall
壁上土.line: Good walls are what make a house a home. Today suits structural work — reinforce what's already standing.

金箔金.name: Gold Leaf
金箔金.line: Gold leaf is paper-thin, yet it makes the whole statue shine. Small details create the big difference today.

覆燈火.name: Lantern Fire
覆燈火.line: A lantern lights only the circle around it. Focus on your small circle and light it well — don't try to illuminate the whole town.

天河水.name: Water of the Sky River
天河水.line: Rain from heaven falls on everyone alike. Give without keeping score today — the sky keeps the ledger for you.

大驛土.name: Earth of the Great Highway
大驛土.line: A highway carries a thousand travelers a day. Stay open to every contact — whatever passes through today is opportunity.

釵釧金.name: Gold of the Bracelet
釵釧金.line: This is gold already shaped into jewelry. What you have today needs only a polish to shine like new.

桑柘木.name: Mulberry Wood
桑柘木.line: The mulberry feeds the silkworms that clothe a whole town. Small work that feeds others is sacred work today.

大溪水.name: Water of the Wide River
大溪水.line: A great river carries boats all the way to the sea. The current is strong and far-reaching today — board the right boat and let the water do the work.

沙中土.name: Earth Among the Sand
沙中土.line: Sandy soil needs watering again and again. Today's work asks for repeated care and steady heart — but the harvest is worth it.

天上火.name: Fire in the Sky
天上火.line: The sun shines on everyone without choosing. Energy overflows today — hand out light all day and never run dry.

石榴木.name: Pomegranate Wood
石榴木.line: One pomegranate holds a hundred seeds. The small things you plant today will multiply beyond what the eye can see.

大海水.name: Water of the Open Sea
大海水.line: The sea receives water from every river. Take in every opinion today with room to spare — your depth is your calm.
